features.title: TC-04-3: Verify CallLog.source='mcp' after chat call
features.description: After calling chat tool via MCP, verify through API that CallLog.source === 'mcp' by querying GET /api/projects/:id/logs with the returned traceId
features.acceptance: Fetch logs with traceId filter, find the log entry, assert source field equals 'mcp'

features.title: TC-04-4: Verify billing consistency between MCP chat and API chat
features.description: Call the same model with identical messages both via MCP chat and POST /v1/chat/completions, then compare cost values
features.acceptance: Two calls should have cost difference <= 5% (when token counts are similar)

features.title: TC-04-7: Verify balance reduction after chat call
features.description: Add balance check before and after chat call, verify that post-call balance < pre-call balance
features.acceptance: Step: get_balance before chat → step: chat → step: get_balance after chat → assert after < before

features.title: TC-05-1: Test generate_image normal call and response structure
features.description: Call generate_image tool with valid model, prompt, and size parameters. Verify response contains imageUrls array, traceId, and cost
features.acceptance: Response.imageUrls is non-empty array, contains valid URLs; traceId is present; cost is a number > 0

features.title: TC-05-2: Verify CallLog.source='mcp' after generate_image call
features.description: After calling generate_image tool, verify through API that the generated CallLog.source === 'mcp'
features.acceptance: Query /api/projects/:id/logs with the returned traceId, assert source === 'mcp'

features.title: TC-05-3: Test generate_image with invalid model error
features.description: Call generate_image with non-existent model name, verify isError=true in response
features.acceptance: Response.isError === true, error message contains 'not found' or model hint

features.title: TC-06-3: Test list_logs with model filter parameter
features.description: Call list_logs with model='deepseek/v3' parameter, verify all returned logs have matching model field

features.title: TC-06-4: Test list_logs with status filter parameter
features.description: Call list_logs with status='success' parameter, verify all returned logs have status='success'

features.title: TC-06-5: Test list_logs with search full-text parameter
features.description: Call list_logs with search='Say OK' parameter (from earlier chat call), verify returned logs contain that prompt
features.acceptance: Returned logs contain entries with matching search term in prompt/response fields

features.title: TC-04-6: Test chat with insufficient balance scenario
features.description: Call chat tool using an API key associated with a project that has balance=0, verify isError=true with balance-related error message
features.acceptance: Response.isError === true, error message mentions balance or insufficient funds

features.title: Prepare test data: Create zero-balance test project
features.description: Either create a test project with balance=0 in seed data, or add a script to set up this scenario dynamically
features.acceptance: A test project exists with balance=0 that can be used for TC-04-6

features.title: Update test script helper functions for API calls
features.description: Enhance test scripts to properly handle API calls to /api/projects/:id/logs and /v1/chat/completions with proper error handling and assertions
features.acceptance: All API calls in test-mcp.ts have proper error handling and status code checks
